title: Talking about my life - Boulder, Colorado 19/21

transcript.text: Okay yeah so yeah cross country yeah that was fun because we you know we'd write we'd do the
Running practice every day after school and run around the cemetery and stuff and do intervals
And races and I was getting faster as the as the weeks went on and starting to pass kids and so
Then I was like by the by the time they made the division varsity and junior varsity I was on
Varsity and um but then I showed up to this race I showed up to this huge race it was like hundreds
Of kids um at fairview high school and for some reason I think maybe because like my family was
There watching or it was just a big race I just got excited when the thing or when the thing when
The dinger went I fucking sprinted ahead and I was in very first place for like the first like
Quarter mile sprinting as fast as I could and I remember I remember some kid mentioning as I ran
Past them oh that guy's not going to be in front for long and yeah I blew myself out and then everybody
Started passing me everybody passed me and people were like passing me and like elbowing me out of
The way and it was like a really like technical race with like single track and stuff and because
People were passing me so fast they were just like mowing me down like fucking knocking me over
I ended up getting like 198th place and the teacher or not the teacher the coach coach guys
Like vresky fucking demoted me not only to junior varsity well to junior varsity but I wasn't even
The alternate on varsity um even though I had been like being one of the fastest kids on the whole team
So they went down to do this race in pueblo which was the same exact course as the state championships
And I wasn't even brought down as as the alternate but then I but then we did a practice race and I got
Like second in the whole team and so he had to put me back in uh varsity again and then we did districts
And I got like eighth and I was the third fast I was the sec I was the third fastest on my team and
Then we did districts and I was the second fastest on my team and I got eighth I got six and just in
Leagues and eighth and districts and I was the second fastest on my team so then I was sent down
And part of the varsity and that was fun because we hung out in a in a uh in a uh hotel and I remember
Like the night before the race like like the girls room had their door open so kind of we we went in
There and hung out with the girls in their room and then I went out with a bunch of girls it was like
Me and like five girls or something like that we walked way out in the field and we sat down and
I told him about the anunnaki I told him about zachariah sitchin and the anunnaki and all of the
Like the planet x and stuff we're like holding hands and I was like it was kind of like a uh
Like you know like around the fire like ghost story or something that was kind of funny but um
Yeah and then we did the race but I got past and I got 29th and I was like all depressed man I was
Like I think I even teared up a little bit man until a couple of girls came and like comforted me and
Then the teacher and then or the uh what do you call them the coach comes and he's like he's like
Well you guys got second so that's all right that's not so bad so we got second place at state even
Though I totally blew up I think mike chapin had a bad race too but some of the other guys had a good
Race jorge jesus had a bad race but like francisco had a good race so we ended up getting second and
Then our girls got second too so I guess overall guys and girls we would have won states so that was
Pretty cool and my parents were there and watched it yeah and like the fastest girl there actually
Got second our fastest guy got fourth that was jorge mexican there were three mexicans they were
Like the fastest runners and then our fastest girl was faith harvell she got second she got second the
Year before but she was running for fairview then I guess from 11th grade to 12th grade she switched
Schools to boulder high but she got second to this girl named melody fairchild who's like the fastest
She went to my school boulder high and she won national championships twice she won the boulder boulder
Once while she was in high school she had the fastest like cross-country time and like that was only
Broken like last year or something like that I heard so anyways um it's pretty crazy but she wasn't on
The team by the time I joined but I was still faster than our fastest girl yeah back then because I weighed
Like 155 pounds I couldn't run for shit now but um I'd like to maybe one day again but um yeah I remember
I was of the mentality back then that if you were young you were going to be faster because there was
This like assistant coach dude who was like 35 or something and I was like yeah dude you can't beat us
Just because if you're old you know that was my attitude so I hope kids these days don't have that
Attitude some kid thinks they can beat me on a bike ride or whatever fucking good luck but actually
Probably could if he's good because I'm not that strong right now but I got smoked by this like 10
Year old kid last month this tiny little munchkin kid fucking zoomed past me dropped my ass on the bike
But anyways um um so yeah so 10th grade so yeah then I knew I met a lot of kids for that grade
And I think yeah and then like some of the kids started having like parties we had like cross
Country team parties and stuff like nick spitzer was on the team I made friends with him and I skied with
Him that winter a few times but my dad for some fucked up reason fucking talked me into being a
Ski patrol at eldora and that wasn't fun there were assholes there and I didn't get paid it was like
Volunteer is bullshit I should have just kept skiing at vale and fucking beaver creek because I we had
The still had the trailer and breckenridge and could have gone skiing with the high school kids
Because I was only skiing with my dad 10th 11th grade but then I started skiing with like nick spitzer
12th grade and that was fun nick spitzer and joss mcbay launching cliffs and stuff filming it
Skiing powder and stuff even though I like skiing bumps they never wanted to ski bumps but they liked
The powder but I got I got into it pretty fun but um um yeah he had a party he had a party once and he
Had this like bungee jump in his backyard and so you could like jump off of a tree over the porch but
Some kid tried it he was on the team and he like hit his back on the porch railing and totally fucked
Up his back and then he had like a zip line in his backyard he had like this amusement park set up in
His backyard and he had all sorts of crazy stories like how he like he was like working on something
And he fell slipped and fell through the hole in his like basketball thing and he like skied and jumped
Across like um jumped across like uh roads up on loveland pass both from up above there
And then the berm but um yeah and then that winter I also took a winter emergency care course
But they failed me twice those fucking assholes they said I didn't do it right they're fucking
They're fucking dicks they just didn't like me oh we did a avalanche course I did it with him
Nick spitzer and we made this like uh what do you call it we made this uh igloo no no we made a uh
Snow cape up on the side of like berthed pass ski areas which was a closed ski resort
But he had like this like he had this uh this like what do you call it oh down sleeping bag which was
Which was too warm summer sleeping bag so he slept in all his clothes but he got too hot and he sweat
So he took all his clothes off and then so he froze again and then he didn't want to put his
Clothes back on because they were uh because they were frozen solid and he couldn't put his boots on
Or his shoes on or his socks on because it was all frozen solid by then so so he was like all right
You go to the car you warm the car up it was this van right here that we were in you warm the car up
And and then I'll come and I'll jump in the car and I'm just gonna ski down in my underwear holding
All of my you bring my clothes and I'll ski down in my underwear and we were like way up on the trail
And and so I was like all right so I came down I turned on the car and then I hear him going oh
Fuck he like skied down straight and then crashed so now so I see him like climbing over like the pile of
Snow and he's like running like limping now because he was like his feet are numb he's running barefoot
In his underwear with snow all over him like oh fuck like in agony his look of terror in his eyes
And he like jumps in the car and like we heal we heat him up he's like it takes it forever
That was kind of funny and then we did the avalanche thing the next day
Yeah and then I actually hung out with some girls too for a little bit because like my friend
Arian wheeler who was a 10th grader I was a 12th grader he was a 10th grader he was a bike racer
He introduced me to these girls jojo leah mina and naomi oh my god I can't believe I remember those
Names there were these really cool like alternative type of like hippie type chicks who was hanging
Out with I hung out with them a few times um and uh and um there were some other parties too
From the uh grades junior high or what the fuck do you call it um cross-country team

Runners weren't social enough for her so it was like amanda beard or something like that
But did we have any oh and then there's this other kid who had a party what was his name cory

Like problem with the teacher because he like took his pants off shit his underwear like on a field
Trip or something like that he was in my latin class and I had latin three years in a row so I had
The same people in my latin class for three years in a row except for for some reason that kid got to be
In our class even though he was just a 10th grader and by the time we got to our 10th grade our 12th
Grade it was only like five of us in latin class so we all had known each other it was kind of funny
There's some kid named like johns of revsky he was in my latin class and he was the guy who got me
Stoned for the very first time we went to a party and he's like I wasn't I was in 10th grade I was like
A week before my 17th birthday or a week before my 18th birthday and he's like yeah man maybe we'll
Just smoke a bowl and I was like huh and then he's like all right let's smoke the bowl and I was like
Wow cool smoking balls never smoked weed before and uh I don't remember getting a stone though I guess
They say you don't get stone the first time you smoke but like nick spitzer freaked out he was like
Running around he was there he was running around jumped up on top of a tree and jumped off the tree
From the branches way up high and we were like running after him like dude don't hurt yourself
He looked like he was totally freaking out and like confused or something I don't know what his
Deal was but then we went skiing with him a few times that dude john came with us once and we got

At it was like one of the first times I got stoned it's like friend of my brother's and I was looking
At the school like he got me high and I got him bottom piece of pizza we were looking at the school
There's this kid he said his parents were like on the mafia we were looking at the school and I felt
Like I was in a tv show I was like looking at my life from the third person it was really weird
Um yeah it was really cool I liked it I was like hooked on weed by at that point I wanted to buy more
Weed I don't know if I actually bought a bag of weed in high school though and by then but in those
Days back in 92 whenever time you bought a weed it was uh mexican weed wasn't strong these days
Whenever you buy weed it's kind boats like mexican doesn't even exist anymore but uh so it's even

Cross-country kids um I asked shannon because she was like a cross-country friend but she went on
